_comment: Playwright MCP config — pins headed mode explicitly so a future @playwright/mcp regression (cf. 0.0.75 silent-headless bug; learning 2026-05-16-brainstorm-premise-cascade-and-playwright-handoff-discipline.md §2 + W4) cannot break the credential-handoff workflow. chromiumSandbox: true + channel chrome: Playwright defaults to --no-sandbox, which Chrome flags as a stability/security risk and which destabilized the long credential-handoff session that stalled issue #5092 (diagnosed 2026-06-10); real Chrome's root SUID helper sandboxes correctly even where AppArmor restricts unprivileged userns (Ubuntu 24.04+), unlike Playwright's bundled Chromium whose chrome_sandbox helper is not setuid. Wire via --config in .mcp.json.
_args_comment: args: HEADED Chrome on a Wayland session (XDG_SESSION_TYPE=wayland) auto-selects the Wayland ozone backend, which is incompatible with the Vulkan/SwiftShader GPU path (Chrome logs 'wayland_surface_factory.cc: --ozone-platform=wayland is not compatible with Vulkan'); the GPU process crashes and every page context drops as 'Target page/context/browser has been closed' (every ~2-3 tool calls — diagnosed 2026-06-17 during the #5480 Resend mint, which crashed repeatedly). Per Chrome's own remediation hint, force the X11/XWayland backend (DISPLAY=:0 is present) and disable the GPU so headed automation renders via software — stable, and headed mode (credential-handoff requirement) is preserved. See knowledge-base/project/learnings/workflow-patterns/2026-06-17-playwright-mcp-wayland-vulkan-launch-crash.md.
_regression_2026_07_18: The @playwright/mcp@latest float reached 0.0.78, which does NOT apply browser.launchOptions.args from --config (the exact regression class this config's headed-mode pin was written to defend against). Verified live during the #6649 R2-cred mint: Chrome still crash-looped on Wayland (5 browser PIDs spawned+died in 3s) with these args present — because they never reached Chrome. Fix: the .mcp.json launch command now (a) forces X11 at the ENVIRONMENT level — `env -u WAYLAND_DISPLAY XDG_SESSION_TYPE=x11 GDK_BACKEND=x11 DISPLAY=${DISPLAY:-:0}` — which is version-independent (Chrome cannot select the Wayland backend it can no longer see), and (b) pins @playwright/mcp@0.0.78 off the floating @latest so a future silent regression cannot recur. The launchOptions.args below are kept as belt-and-suspenders for versions that DO honor them; the env-level forcing is now the load-bearing mechanism. IMPORTANT: .mcp.json changes only load on a full Claude Code restart, NOT on `/mcp` reconnect (which reuses the cached command).
